data.body: CHECKPOINT 8 (near-complete): FULL STACK LANDED on main (560180461): #661 ADR, #667 flakefix, #665 d0e5, #666 bcf0, #668 5e7a, #669 f542 all MERGED. Closed+signed: d0e5, bcf0, 5e7a, f542, 19d7; bugs dc33/15a1/0d3e force-closed obsolete. bcf0 LIVE decommission DONE (containers+volumes removed, CloudWatch alarm + SSM param destroyed via terraform apply, plan now empty, host stack healthy). 03c6 project.config change committed (459224ce8) + pushed #671 (in CI): submit FFO->rebase-if-necessary, removed Autosubmit label+ACL+rebase-on-behalf, Verified copyCondition += TRIVIAL_REBASE (ADR0047 R5 relaxation; NOT MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE). BLOCKER for the LIVE refs/meta/config APPLY: JoeOakhartNava admin credential is in the login keychain but NOT retrievable in this headless session — git credential fill returns -25320/'Device not configured' (its keychain item ACL needs interactive authorization; RebarBotNava works, identical attrs). Live submit_type still FAST_FORWARD_ONLY (confirmed via read). Needs: user to authorize the JoeOakhartNava keychain item for git, OR run the refs/meta/config apply. Everything else complete; epic d4de closes after the cutover applies + verifies.
